artifact_classification: authoritative Step 11 production specification and geometry construction blueprint; no production artifact
decision: Approve a buildable, evidence-mapped construction plan for later Step 12 without creating geometry, DCC, texture, export, or Unreal output.

identity.gameplay_role: large environmental ritual/territorial cairn prop and readable landmark
identity.pipeline_status_after_step11: pre-production construction blueprint approved; no DCC source candidate

scope.preexisting_local_core_recovery_classifi: quarantined/reference-only historical diagnostics; preserved and not consumed

coordinate_frame.pivot_role: bottom-center construction datum at ground station; production convention only
coordinate_frame.transform_apply_policy: apply object scale and rotation before audit; mesh data remains in centimeters
coordinate_frame.exact_claim_boundary: targets are authoritative production dimensions; they do not validate one physical source-pixel scale or source transform

construction_order.description: irregular peripheral small-stone apron macro shell
construction_order.method: construct the N3/K80 transition lattice under R3/R5/R7/R9, apply only source-owned inward silhouette refinements, add the flat Z=0 underside, then close independently
build an owner-view faceted course inside its independent containment, preserve K80 only at the visible CL-003 boundary, add independent hidden caps, and intersect C-004 by the approved overlap
build a component-specific owner-view faceted course without copying C-003, add independent hidden caps, and intersect C-003/C-001 only inside approved hidden overlap

construct independent front-owned XZ and left-owned YZ piecewise-linear profiles, join adjacent owner lanes with direct planar corner facets under R7/R9 authority routing, cap top and hidden bottom, and preserve target extrema
create no Step 12 geometry; reserve face-owned UV/material regions and defer Base Color, Normal, ORM, and emissive meaning to Step 14

C001.profile_method: piecewise-linear owner-view constraints; no averaging or analytic smoothing
C001.corner_method: direct planar gap facets with no standalone inferred corner vertices

C002.individual_stone_divisions: Normal/BaseColor planning consumer except source-critical silhouette breaks

C003.shape_source: component-specific front/left visible profiles; no copied/scaled K80 course
C003.individual_stone_divisions: Normal/BaseColor planning consumer except source-critical silhouette breaks

C004.source_refinement: front/left exact outer anchors may cut inward only; back/right are holdouts
C004.small_rubble_microdetail: Normal/BaseColor later; do not model every tiny stone

contacts_and_hidden_interfaces.failure_policy: any visible closure/overlap or insufficient positive intersection blocks Step 12; do not repair by moving visible contact edges

topology_plan.runtime_arrangement: one combined Static Mesh containing four disconnected watertight shells
topology_plan.triangulation: deterministic at final export; DCC may retain planar quads where authority groups remain traceable
topology_plan.face_normals: preserve faceted silhouette and major plane breaks; no autosmooth operation may alter geometry
topology_plan.hidden_face_policy: omit permanently hidden internal faces except independent caps and approved overlap faces
topology_plan.required_sidecar: Step 12 geometry manifest with vertex/face ranges mapped to STEP_11_VERTEX_AUTHORITY_MAP.json
topology_plan.self_intersection_policy: only the three approved component-overlap volumes; all other self/inter-component intersections fail

lod_plan.preserve: all source-critical primary silhouettes, course separation, large apron silhouette stones

lod_plan.remove_first: small apron silhouette facets and secondary course breaks; preserve C001 and N3 outer silhouette
minor planar subdivisions and small masonry separations; preserve four-layer read
all non-silhouette subdivisions; preserve 220/140/110 envelope and stepped base silhouette

uv_material_texture_plan.uv0: unique 0-1 islands grouped by C001/C002/C003/C004 and face-owned C005/C006/C007 regions; exact seams deferred to Step 14
uv_material_texture_plan.uv1: non-overlapping lightmap channel planned; resolution and packing validation deferred
uv_material_texture_plan.optional_emissive_status: unapproved and absent unless Step 14 explicitly approves
uv_material_texture_plan.base_color_authority: visible source-owned RGB only after Step 14 plan

future_paths.automation_root_preexisting_content: CoreRecovery/ only; quarantined/reference-only and forbidden as Step 12 input

validators.check: input hashes, schema, source/interpretation labels, allowlist, production-root absence
A005-only imports/constants/outputs; reject A001-A004 asset-specific paths
assembled/C001/C004/base target bounds and pivot in centimeters
every vertex exactly one primary VAG mapping with source/rule lineage
front and left construction-owner samples hit approved observations under S11-TR-002; no N3 exceedance
back/right source observations validate without changing construction ownership; mismatch blocks
four watertight shells, zero non-manifold/open/degenerate faces, only approved overlaps
one-centimeter positive overlap and zero visible closure/overlap pixels across owner views
LOD0 candidate <=10000 tris; decoration geometry zero
six required views, marker pass when orientation uncertain, clean rerun before presentation

blocked_methods: A001-A004 asset-specific input or builder reuse
copied or scaled C002/C003 component contour
shared exact contact loop or snap anchor
repairing holdout failure by changing source authority
step12_entry_contract_requirements: new visible Step 12 contract after mandatory restart
fresh A005-only generator or controlled Blender construction
all asset constants read from approved A005 manifests
listed inputs and outputs before execution
geometry manifest with complete VAG coverage
numeric/topology audit before any proof render
no UV, texture, final material, LOD, collision, FBX, or Unreal escalation
step12_fail_closed_conditions: source observation cannot be satisfied without averaging or smoothing
C001 contact does not fit within C002 containment
hidden overlap visible in any owner view

approval.authority_statement: resume, I am giving you full authority to do whatever you need to to complete step 11 from start to finish, You have full approval and Authority
approval.decision: approved under the exact Step 11 contract after complete validation
